segments.text: Even down a stock, this long-range down B can pull off all sorts of things. And down B is dealing decent percent!
segments.original_text: いいんですけれどもラインない状態だとかねこういう距離の長い下Bとかだと 意外といろいろできちゃいますねそして下Bだいぶのパーセント

full_text: Even down a stock, this long-range down B can pull off all sorts of things. And down B is dealing decent percent!
